name: Overlay
reason: The Overlay component was too generic and created ambiguous usage. It has been split into focused replacements.
migrationPath: Use Dialog for modal overlays and Drawer for side-panel overlays. See the Modal and Navigation component specs.

name: color.brand.primary
reason: The brand.primary alias was ambiguous and conflated brand color with interaction color.
migrationPath: Use color.primary.600 for interactive elements or color.semantic.action.primary for semantic usage.

name: spacing.xs
reason: Named size aliases (xs, sm, md) were replaced with a numeric scale for consistency with the layout grid.
migrationPath: Use spacing.2 (8px) in place of spacing.xs. See the spacing scale documentation.

name: typography.body
reason: Composite text style tokens are no longer shipped — use individual typography primitives instead.
migrationPath: Compose typography.fontSize.base, typography.lineHeight.normal, and typography.fontWeight.regular individually.

name: GET /prompt-templates
reason: Replaced by the MCP Prompts primitive, which makes templates discoverable by any MCP client natively.
migrationPath: Use MCP prompts/list and prompts/get methods to enumerate and retrieve prompt templates.
